title: BCH four laws by regime
stage13_round1_summary: Round-1 surfaced 6 BLOCKERs + 2 REQUIRED. All 8 remediated 2026-05-01: (1.1, 1.2, 1.3) three lift-time-bibitem-retypesetting regressions (Reall arXiv 2412.05678→2410.11956 + correct title; Kirklin title fabrication→registry-canonical; KehleUnger title fabrication→registry-canonical; all three were correct in registry + paper27 but L3 author-rewrite introduced fresh errors). (2.1) \Ladw macro Λ_ADW→Λ_UV to match paper27/Lean. (5.1) four fabricated falsifier names→actual Lean names (falsifier_acoustic_decay_form / falsifier_schwarzschild_heating / falsifier_third_law_form / falsifier_alpha_ADW_dependence). (6.1) Israel third-law parenthetical (κ→0 at finite proper time was the VIOLATION form not the law; corrected to 'attainable only at infinite affine time'). (6.2) H_RegimePartition rewritten as 5-field structure matching Lean exactly. (6.3) Eq. (Tacoustic) reframed as exponential alias of canonical linear-in-t leading order. LaTeX recompiles clean. 8 ledger entries appended.
stage13_round2_summary: Round-2 (2026-05-01T19:05Z) verified ALL 8 round-1 findings clean. Verdict GREEN. Round-broadening checks: 5-field align* environment compiles cleanly; bibitem format style differs from paper27 (``Title,'' vs \textit{Title}) but factual content agrees — no new BLOCKER; Eq. (Tsonic) citation preserved; PDF compiles 3 pages 334152 bytes 0 undefined refs 0 LaTeX errors. Bundle is submission-ready at the L3-Tier-2-PRL-splash scope. All 5 affected gates (CitationIntegrity / CrossPaperConsistency / LeanProofSubstance / AssumptionDisclosure / NarrativeGrounding) flipped blocked→cleared.
notes: Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.1 CLOSED at GREEN 2026-05-01T19:05Z. 2-round Stage-13 cycle: round-1 6 BLOCKERs/2 REQUIRED → round-2 GREEN. 8 supersession ledger entries appended for round-1 closures. The lift introduced *fresh* bibitem regressions on three citations that paper27 had correct — load-bearing lesson for future BUNDLE_LIFT_PROCEDURE.md refinement (single-source bundle should inherit bibitem text verbatim from source paper; QI candidate `bundle_bibitem_inheritance` validator). | 2026-05-06 Session-2 stage10 round-3 in progress; Stage 9 GREEN (1 figure, ALL PASS). | 2026-05-06 Session-2 stage10 round-3 GREEN (51 sentences walked + 7 new substrate-class-context sentences; 0 BLOCKER, 1 WARN + 2 followups all closed via paper_draft.tex Edits + bundle_clusters.py rerun). All L3 round-3 follow-ups (Roehm2026EmergentGravity registry alignment, cluster_bundle_index reproject, below-end-document stub cleanup) closed. | Stage-13 round-1 GREEN 2026-05-06 (0 BLOCKER, 2 REQUIRED, 2 RECOMMENDED).
